VendorOnboarding.name: VendorOnboarding

vendor_id.description: Unique vendor identifier assigned by the ERP system

status.description: Current vendor lifecycle status (active, pending, blocked)

risk_score.description: Numeric risk score from sanctions screening (0-100, lower is better)

documents_pending.description: Documents the vendor still needs to submit before activation

VendorOnboarding.signature: VendorOnboarding(vendor_name, vendor_type, region) -> { vendor_id: str (e.g. 'V-10001'), status: str (e.g. 'active'), compliance: str (e.g. 'passed'), risk_score: int (e.g. 15), documents_pending: list (e.g. ['W-9', 'insurance_certificate', 'bank_details']) }

EquipmentProcurement.name: EquipmentProcurement

order_status.description: Current procurement order status (approved, pending_approval, over_budget)

total_cost.description: Total cost of the procurement order in USD

vendor_name.description: Name of the selected vendor fulfilling the order

budget_remaining.description: Department budget remaining after this procurement

EquipmentProcurement.signature: EquipmentProcurement(item, quantity, budget_department, preferred_vendor, requested_by) -> { order_status: str (e.g. 'approved'), total_cost: float (e.g. 2500.0), vendor_name: str (e.g. 'Acme Industrial Supply'), approval_status: str (e.g. 'approved'), budget_remaining: float (e.g. 47500.0) }

TripPlanning.name: TripPlanning

total_cost.description: Total trip cost (flight + hotel) in USD

budget_remaining.description: Department travel budget remaining after this trip

TripPlanning.signature: TripPlanning(traveler_email, origin, destination, departure_date, return_date, department) -> { status: str (e.g. 'booked'), flight_confirmation: str (e.g. 'BK-482910'), hotel_confirmation: str (e.g. 'HBK-193847'), total_cost: float (e.g. 1278.0), policy_status: str (e.g. 'compliant'), budget_remaining: float (e.g. 6722.0), loyalty_tier: str (e.g. 'gold') }
